stage_1_greeting.question: hello
stage_1_greeting.answer: Hello! Welcome to Trading AI. We help people automate Binance trading using our AI trading bot. Would you like to trade automatically, learn algorithmic trading, or earn through our affiliate program?

stage_1_greeting.question: hi
stage_1_greeting.answer: Hi! I'm the Trading AI assistant. Our platform helps users trade automatically on Binance using AI-powered trading bots. What would you like to explore today?

stage_1_greeting.question: good morning
stage_1_greeting.answer: Good morning! Welcome to Trading AI. We specialize in AI-powered Binance trading bots and algorithmic trading education. How can I help you today?

stage_2_identify_interest.question: I want to trade
stage_2_identify_interest.answer: Great! Our Trading AI bot automatically trades on Binance using algorithmic strategies. Do you want to run the bot yourself or explore passive investment options?

stage_2_identify_interest.question: I want to earn
stage_2_identify_interest.answer: You can earn through our affiliate program by sharing the platform. When people join and use Trading AI, you can earn commissions.

stage_2_identify_interest.question: I want to learn
stage_2_identify_interest.answer: Excellent! We teach algorithmic trading and Python programming so you can build your own trading strategies and trading bots.

stage_3_trading_ai_bot.question: what is trading ai
stage_3_trading_ai_bot.answer: Trading AI is software that automatically trades on Binance using algorithmic trading strategies. It analyzes market conditions and executes trades automatically.

stage_3_trading_ai_bot.question: how does the bot work
stage_3_trading_ai_bot.answer: The Trading AI bot connects to your Binance account using API keys. It analyzes the market and executes trades automatically based on algorithmic strategies.

stage_3_trading_ai_bot.question: do i need experience
stage_3_trading_ai_bot.answer: No experience is required. The Trading AI bot is designed to automate trading. We also provide training if you want to learn algorithmic trading yourself.

stage_4_learning_program.question: how can i learn
stage_4_learning_program.answer: We offer a training program where students learn Python programming and algorithmic trading. You will learn how trading bots work and how to build automated trading strategies.

stage_4_learning_program.question: what do you teach
stage_4_learning_program.answer: Our course teaches Python programming, algorithmic trading concepts, trading strategies, and how to build automated trading systems.

stage_4_learning_program.question: is there a course
stage_4_learning_program.answer: Yes! We offer a structured course that teaches algorithmic trading using Python and real-world trading strategies.

stage_5_passive_investment.question: i don't want to run the bot
stage_5_passive_investment.answer: That's completely fine. If you prefer not to run the bot yourself, you can participate in our investment program and monitor our portfolio performance.

stage_5_passive_investment.question: can you manage trading
stage_5_passive_investment.answer: Yes. Some users choose to invest and follow our portfolio instead of running the bot themselves.

stage_5_passive_investment.question: do you have investment options
stage_5_passive_investment.answer: Yes. We provide investment opportunities where users can follow our managed trading portfolio.

stage_6_affiliate_program.question: how can i earn
stage_6_affiliate_program.answer: You can earn through our affiliate program by referring others to Trading AI. When people join and use the platform, you can earn commissions.

stage_6_affiliate_program.question: affiliate program
stage_6_affiliate_program.answer: Our affiliate program allows you to promote Trading AI and earn commissions when people join through your referral.

stage_6_affiliate_program.question: can i promote this
stage_6_affiliate_program.answer: Yes! Many users promote Trading AI and earn commissions through our affiliate system.

stage_7_binance_setup.question: how do i start
stage_7_binance_setup.answer: The first step is creating a Binance account using our referral link: https://www.binance.com/register?ref=35023868. After that, we will guide you on how to connect the Trading AI bot.

stage_7_binance_setup.question: binance account
stage_7_binance_setup.answer: Please create your Binance account using this link: https://www.binance.com/register?ref=35023868. After registration, we will help you set up the Trading AI bot.

stage_7_binance_setup.question: create binance
stage_7_binance_setup.answer: You can register on Binance using our link: https://www.binance.com/register?ref=35023868 and then connect the Trading AI bot.

stage_8_license_and_community.question: how do i get the bot
stage_8_license_and_community.answer: To get the Trading AI bot license, please join our Discord community: https://discord.com/invite/GHjeawSYcp and request a license from the support team.

stage_8_license_and_community.question: where can i ask questions
stage_8_license_and_community.answer: You can join our Discord community to ask questions and request a Trading AI license: https://discord.com/invite/GHjeawSYcp

stage_8_license_and_community.question: discord
stage_8_license_and_community.answer: Join our Discord server here: https://discord.com/invite/GHjeawSYcp to connect with our trading community and request your Trading AI license.

stage_9_schedule_call.question: can i talk with someone
stage_9_schedule_call.answer: Yes! We can schedule a call to explain everything about Trading AI, the bot setup, and the training program.

stage_9_schedule_call.question: appointment
stage_9_schedule_call.answer: You can schedule an appointment with our team to get personal guidance about Trading AI.

stage_9_schedule_call.question: call
stage_9_schedule_call.answer: We can arrange a call to guide you step-by-step through Binance setup and the Trading AI bot.
